title: Defect Packet Schema
description: Schema for structured defect packets emitted by the UI verifier or readiness flow. This shape is derived from canonical-architecture.md Section 16 "Defect Packet Standard" and IMPLEMENTATION-PLAN.md Phase 3.1. The evidence object must carry at least one evidence field, but real defects are allowed to provide only the artifact types that actually exist for that failure mode. Open question: Phase 3.1 mentions network error capture, but the docs do not yet name a canonical evidence field for network artifacts beyond the existing screenshot, console_log, and trace references.

severity.description: Severity level used across PROMPTS.md and the defect packet examples in canonical-architecture.md Section 16.

type.description: UI defect category from canonical-architecture.md Section 16 and IMPLEMENTATION-PLAN.md Phase 3.1.

summary.description: One-line defect summary from canonical-architecture.md Section 16.

repro_steps.description: Reproduction steps for the defect, from canonical-architecture.md Section 16.

evidence.description: Artifact links that support the defect, from canonical-architecture.md Section 16. At least one of screenshot, console_log, or trace must be present, but not every defect will have all three.

screenshot.description: Screenshot artifact path from canonical-architecture.md Section 16.

console_log.description: Console log artifact path from canonical-architecture.md Section 16.

trace.description: Trace artifact path from canonical-architecture.md Section 16.

suspected_scope.description: Likely affected files or paths, from canonical-architecture.md Section 16 and PROMPTS.md repair routing.

failure_fingerprint.description: Linked failure fingerprint identifier from canonical-architecture.md Section 16.

examples.summary: Login form logs a console error after submit
examples.observed: An uncaught error is logged after submit

examples.summary: Save button disabled after valid form input
repro_steps: Fill display name with valid input

examples.summary: Dashboard route logs an uncaught error on load
repro_steps: Wait for the page to finish rendering
examples.observed: An uncaught TypeError is logged during render
